feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Merboy
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,024Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 35

Summary: “You know,” Clark said slowly, putting his hand on his hips. “I am, trying to help!”The boy immediately bared his sharp teeth, letting out a low growl, and glared at Clark.“Look— it’s either you want me to help or you can stay stuck here forever,” Clark threatened knowing the fact that he would never do that. The boy folded his arms, his eyes glancing at the rock trapping him as he sat silent.-Or, an AU where Bruce is a merman and secretly childhood friends with Clark. But then Bruce disappeared ever since he told Clark about the death of his parents, yet Clark still waited, for years.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: we have time
entry.summary:
Author: Thank_yuze

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,221Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: “‘M so close- please, B, I’m so close, please.” Clark sobbed helplessly, Bruce’s face growing blurry as tears clouded his eyes.A reedy keen tore itself out of Clark’s throat as Bruce- as Bruce stopped, letting Clark slip out of him. He sat firmly in Clark's lap, pinning him down with his weight. Clark let out a loud whine as his hips cant up, instinctually searching for the hot friction of Bruce’s channel. Bruce shushed him softly, petting down the wide expanse of his sweaty chest. There he stayed, unmoving and cruel, until Clark’s desperate, pleading sobs at being denied again turned into pathetic little sniffles.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,373Chapters: 12/15Kudos: 610

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: What Becomes of the Unready
entry.summary:
Author: NewYorke

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,766Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 58

Summary: “When a fledgling leaves the nest, there isn’t much the parent can do. They gave it warmth, shelter, and every scrap of knowledge they knew. But there comes a point where the sky calls, and the chick must answer alone. It will either follow its instincts and take flight, or plummet into the jaws of a world hungry without mercy.” —--- You’d been on plenty of watches in the rain, knew how to keep your footing while leaping from rooftop to rooftop. This was Gotham, after all–the city had its own kind of plot armor, keeping the streets as sullen as humanly possible. To have a patrol without rain was to have coffee without sugar.   Tonight, though, you were flying solo. Bruce would’ve permanently benched you if he knew, but honestly… whatever. You’d solved cases on your own before, tailed bad guys, peeked at the cams. How different could it be? You could *see* Bruce from where you were anyways. It was a little harmless shadowing, what he didn’t know couldn’t hurt him. You’d slip back into the manor before they started to head back. Besides, the team was still nearby, somewhere in the shadows.   Aka: Joker finally catches a chick the moment it drops from the nest

entry.title: Maybe I just wanna be yours
entry.summary:
Author: ann_Blck

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,137Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: Clark has been acting strange lately.Bruce doesn't know exactly what happened, but he knows he did something and needs to fix it.At the end, it's not as complicated as they thought. This is a translation of my own fic, there's a version in Spanish at my profile:)

entry.title: Comfort and Vigilante Missions
entry.summary:
Author: Not_here_o7

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,474Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Roy Harper's love life has finally taken a good turn... because of you! Just hope it says that way. Aka:You love Roy. And Jason loves him. But Roy loves both of you. Hopefully nothing goes bad. Edit 5/19/2026: Playlist I listen to while writing! — https://open.spotify.com/playlist/2OVn67PlwSAkf7PtX9Eqzs?si=YjdlbYvQTfabUzs2vWwKOg&pi=swYsl7z2TfqrY

entry.title: the best parts of lonely
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,691Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 389

Summary: Clark Kent has a pretty great thing going for him. He's the backup goalie for the Gotham Blades, the worst team in NHL history, and he's working on his journalism degree. He never has to worry about money and he's got plenty of free time to be Superman and partner with the Justice League. It's all going really well. Until Bruce Wayne ruins everything. “When I asked you what you wanted for your birthday, you said you wanted the Blades to,” Bruce used air quotes which shouldn't be endearing, “win an ‘effing’ game for once in your life.” "What,” Jason barks out a laugh, “you’re gonna bribe a ref or somethin’?” “Goodness no!” Bruce cries out dramatically clutching his hands to his chest, utterly scandalized. “What do you take me for? A criminal? Of course not, Jason. I would never! I am a good influence.” Jason continues to glare at him, clearly waiting for something. “I bought the team,” Bruce announces.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: one day i am gonna grow wings (this is how it feels to take the fall)
entry.summary:
Author: no_imnotafraidtodisappear

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,814Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 190

Summary: Neil Josten wasn’t stupid.Neil Josten knew how to nurse himself back to health after that night in January. He made his own suits, he made his own webs. Neil Josten put his life back together piece by piece, all by himself.Neil Josten had survived.Even so Neil Josten knew he should’ve kept running. Neil Josten should’ve known his time was running out. Neil Josten should’ve heeded his mother’s advice instead of sticking out like a sore thumb, even with his mask on.No, Neil Josten wasn’t stupid. Neil Josten was dumb.——————————————————Neil has been Spider-man (and alone) for quite sometime. One mission goes sideways and New York's not-so-friendly Spider-man dies. Neil wakes up in New Jersey... in another universe. Many problems arise.Please mind the tags. There will be some graphic stuff. I try to put TWs at the beginning of the chapter, though. You have been warned. Slow updates. this fic is inspired by both of these fics:Hope Was A Dangerous, Disquieting Thing by BisexualChaosDemonLeap of Faith by alighterwood and ErinWantsToWrite

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,496Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 203

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.title: Falling for the playboy
entry.summary:
Author: Cringe_Fella

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,599Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 95

Summary: “Oh, Smallville, this is down bad, even for you. And don't even think for a second that I'll let you off the hook without hearing that story," She said, then looked at Bruce Wayne. Grimaced, "Well. As your best friend, guess I gotta do this, huh?” Confidently as always she hooked a hand back under Clark's elbow to steer him. Immediately, alarms started blaring in Clark's head. “Let's go get your billionaire.” “Lois!” Clark hissed, panicked. But he was still inexplicably letting her move him towards her new target, legs almost feeling like they'd moved on their own, "We can't just– He's– he's busy and–" Lois just smiled at him sharply, and Clark thought that he really was on point with that shark comparison earlier as she led him straight to the gallows.   Or; Clark falls in love with Bruce Wayne... Que superbat identity porn with brief exasperated best friend Lois

entry.title: Dead Reckoning: Part Three
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,849Chapters: 2/15Kudos: 4

Summary: The Silax treatment is ready, but the cure is no simple rescue. To silence the queen inside him, Aven must let the inhibitor fail, wake the thing Weyland-Yutani built him to carry, and trust Bruce, Clark, Amanda, his brothers, and the children he left behind to keep him alive through the worst of it. For the first time, everyone is in the same room. Secrets come out. Old wounds split open. Family stops being something Aven can protect from a distance and becomes the only reason he can face what comes next. But beyond the Fortress, LexCorp’s stolen files reveal that Weyland’s work has not stopped with Aven. The procedure may end one nightmare. It may also uncover the next. (God, I really suck at summaries lmao)

entry.title: The Dark Knight
entry.summary:
Author: NemoFinch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,412Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Clark has always been a champion when it came to jousting, even in the first match. His size alone gives him an advantage from getting knocked off his horse. That was until the Dark Knight appeared. A pretty stupid name according to Clark. It doesn't help that for the first time Clark may have found his match at tournaments by this so-called Dark Knight. Despite it all, Clark can't seem to stop thinking about him...in more than one way.
